title: Madurai、Tamil Nadu — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Madurai、Tamil Nadu的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Madurai是Tamil Nadu的一个城市，人口约1,500,000。One of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world, known for the magnificent Meenakshi Amman Temple and Tamil culture.
